---
title: "Data Analysis"
author: "Simon Gendrisch"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r, packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
source("./utils.R")
```


```{r, Load layers}

# QField points
qfield_wp <- st_read("./data/GIS/test/survey_data.gpkg", layer = "survey_data")
```

Calculate distance from reticles or angle (in degree) and observer height (in m).
```{r}

obs_height = 2    # Observer height in meters

df <- qfield_wp %>%  
  mutate(
    distance = case_when(
      !is.na(reticles) ~ calculate_distance_bino(reticles = reticles, height = obs_height), # If reticles available reticles will be used to calculate distance
      !is.na(vert_angle) ~ calculate_distance_inclino(angle = vert_angle, height = obs_height),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ) ) %>% 
   mutate(
    method_used = case_when(
      !is.na(reticles) ~ "reticle", 
      !is.na(vert_angle) ~ "angle",
      TRUE ~ "missing"
    )
  )






```
